sections.sectionTitle: Bildad in Migilote' Thuak Dingte Gen

verses.text: Tua ciangin Shuah gammi Bildad in dawng a
“Job aw, khawl hun nei theilo ding na hi hiam? Hong khawl phot lecin, thu kong gen thei ding uh hi
Bang hangin bawng bang lelin kote hong ngaihsun a, mihaipi-in kote hong seh na hi hiam
Na hehna tawh nangmah a kigimsak bek na hi hi. Nangma hangin leitung kinusia ding a, mualte a kinkhia dingin ngaihsun na hi hiam
“Migilopa' meivak kisumit ding a, cikmah hunin kuangkik nawnlo ding hi
Ama buk sungah a meivak mit ding a, ama inn sungah khua a mial ding hi
A khe kip ngei a, ahi zongin tu-in a khe bai ta hi. Amah in a ngaihsut khialhna a puklawh hi
Thangsiahna ngen sungah amah bungbu tuk a, gum sungah amah kia hi
Thangah a khetulin awk a, thangkhau in amah gakcip hi
Amah siahna-in leilakah khauzak kitung a, a paina ding lampi-ah thang kisiah hi
Lauhuaina in amah pang a, a kalsuanna khempeuh a sulzuih hi
A hauh ngei hangin tu-in gilkial ta a, siatna in a su dingin amah ngak gige hi
A kihtakhuai natna in a pum khempeuh tuam a, a khut leh a khete muatsakmang khinta hi
Lungmuang takin a omna a inn panin amah kikaikhia a, Sihna Kumpipa kiangah amah kitun'pih hi
Ahih hangin zatui tawh ama inn a kisian'suah khit ciangin tua inn-ah a ut peuhpeuh teng thei pah ding hi
Lei sunga ama zungte keu-in, a tunga a hiangte a si ta hi
Inn leh gamah ama minthan'na beita a, kuamah in amah phawkkha nawnlo hi
A nungtate' gam panin amah kihawlkhia ding a, khuavakna mun panin khuamialna-ah kihawlkhia ding hi
Amah in suanlekhak neilo a, ama ten'nasa munah ama gui a zom ding omlo hi
Nisuahna pan nitumna dong ama thuakna a za peuhmah kigaihin a ling uh hi
Migilote, Pasian a ngaihsun lote a thutawpna uh tu-a bang ahi hi,” a ci hi.
